with inner-voice harmonies on beats 2–3; motion through IV, iv, and dominant preparation; ends on V7"},{"id":"B","bar_start":9,"bar_end":16,"description":"Contrasting section with sustained pedal F# in middle voice against flowing 8th-note countermelody; tonicizes E major (IV) before returning to B major; lyrical and melodically active"},{"id":"A-prime","bar_start":17,"bar_end":24,"description":"Varied return of A material with enriched texture; broader harmonic range touching VI and raised-II color; sequential motion through chromatic inner voices leading to conclusive PAC in B major"}]}
